M2310_ECR_UK M2310 (M0840) Emergent Care Reason- Reason Unknown This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was unknown. 0 = Not Checked (Not Unknown), 1 = Checked (Unknown) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
M2310_ECR_RSPRTRY_INFCTN M2310 Emergent Care Reason- Respiratory Infection This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to respiratory infection. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
